steps.title: Identify Wright's finding
steps.content: The passage states Wright found lunar intensity to be positively associated with foraging by three-striped night monkeys. This key signal means: as lunar intensity increases, foraging also increases.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content: C correctly expresses Wright's finding as a relationship between lunar intensity and monkey foraging. The others either focus on vision (A), apply the relationship to pocket mice (B), or provide the mechanism rather than the observation (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
